title: ixora malabarica
intro: Ixora malabarica, also known as the Jungle Geranium, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of the Western Ghats in India. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ixora malabarica include its ability to reduce fever, relieve headaches and joint pain, and treat various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, Ixora malabarica is often used to make decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
